description: Golden LockedSubmission contentHash for the insurance fixture (task 009): the DOMAIN_SCHEMA §6 complete flow, q_at_fault_accident=true revealing the required follow-up. The hash is SHA-256 (lowercase hex) over canonicalJson({ answers, flowState }) — see prepare-submission.ts for the canonicalization contract.
